# Dashboard

> Configurable dashboard for visualizing observability data

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Dashboard name |
| description | string | yes | - | What this dashboard shows |
| layout | json | yes | - | Grid layout config (widgets, positions, sizes) |
| filters | json | yes | - | Default filters (time range, model, agent) |
| refreshInterval | integer | yes | 30 | Auto-refresh interval in seconds |
| isDefault | boolean | yes | false | Show on home page |
| owner | string | yes | - | Who created this dashboard |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/dashboard` — List all
- `POST /api/dashboard` — Create
- `GET /api/dashboard/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/dashboard/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/dashboard/:id` — Delete
